title: Provider Egress Policy
description: XP-03: tier x provider egress gate for the delegation face (a task contract / context pack handed to an external LLM CLI), as opposed to egress-policy.json (SA-04, network/domain face). Declares, per provider, whether it keeps material on this machine (local-only) or sends it to a vendor API (external-api), and per data tier which providers may receive that tier's material. Consumed by libs/core/provider-egress-gate.ts's checkProviderEgress.

providers.description: Egress label per provider id (e.g. 'claude', 'codex', 'agy', 'gemini', 'copilot'). A provider absent from this map is treated as unknown -- not automatically local-only.

egress.description: 'external-api': the provider's CLI sends the payload to a vendor-hosted API. 'local-only': inference stays on this machine.

tier_policy.description: Per data tier, which providers may receive material of that tier. `public` is always any-provider and is not overridable here -- the gate fails open for public regardless of this file's presence/validity.

approved_providers.description: Provider ids explicitly approved to receive confidential-tier material.
Provider ids explicitly approved to receive personal-tier material despite not being local-only. Providers declared `local-only` in `providers` are allowed without appearing here.
